prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2023–2025年理科最低位次约7102→7274→7694，连续三年后移，累计后移约592名；2025年基准位次约7694名，呈逐年走低趋势；该校在新疆理 科招生计划2023年62人、2024年65人、2025年66人，2026年计划71人，较2025年扩招约7.6%，计划增加使竞争略有加剧，位次数字有增大压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程 、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第75名，近年排名稳定在70–75名区间，属中上水平理工类院校；该校在声誉舆情、抖音热度及投档异常数据中 均未出现显著信号，整体报考热度平稳，无明显正面或负面舆情扰动；该校以地质学、地质资源与地质工程为传统优势，相关 专业在招生计划中占比较高。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等热门专业社会热度持续偏高，该校相关专业招生位次靠前，对整体位次有上拉作用；新疆2026年普通高考总人数约23.8万人，较2025年理科5.25万人大幅增长，竞争显著加剧，较2024年390分明显上升，反映整体竞争趋紧。该校位于北京，对新疆考生有一定地域吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年扩招约7.6%带来的竞 争加剧、新疆考生规模大幅增长，在2025年基准7694名基础上预计位次继续后移；预测最低位次约8100名，区间7695–8505名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2023 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Science was approximately 7102 → 7274 → 7694, shifting backward for three consecutive years, with a cumulative shift of about 592 places; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 7694, showing a declining trend year by year; the university's enrollment plan for Science in Xinjiang was 62 in 2023, 65 in 2024, 66 in 2025, and 71 in 2026, an increase of about 7.6% compared to 2025, which slightly intensifies competition and puts upward pressure on ranking numbers.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 75th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with a stable range of 70–75 in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level of science and engineering institutions; no significant signals in reputation, Douyin popularity, or abnormal admission data, with overall application heat stable and no obvious positive or negative public opinion disturbances; the university's traditional strengths are geology, geological resources, and geological engineering, with related majors accounting for a high proportion of the enrollment plan.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to have high social heat, and the university's related majors have higher admission rankings, pulling up the overall ranking; the total number of ordinary college entrance exam takers in Xinjiang in 2026 is about 238,000, a significant increase from the 52,500 Science takers in 2025, sharply intensifying competition, with a clear rise from the 390-point threshold in 2024, reflecting a tightening competitive environment. The university is located in Beijing, which has some regional appeal for Xinjiang students.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the continuous backward shift trend of historical rankings, the intensified competition due to a 7.6% enrollment expansion in 2026, and the substantial growth in the number of Xinjiang examinees, the ranking is expected to continue shifting backward from the 2025 baseline of 7694; the predicted minimum ranking is about 8100, with a range of 7695–8505.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 7695–8505, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, use Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and Tier 3 majors as a safety net; if the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 7700), you can prioritize competitive Tier 1 majors like Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, and Electronic Information; if the ranking is close to the upper limit (e.g., beyond 8400), it is advisable to mainly rely on Tier 3 majors as a safety net while aiming for Tier 2 majors.
